message: I'll bid 48 this round. If you ask 48 or less, we trade and can repeat near this level each round. If no deal, I'll raise by 2 per round. Early agreement earns you more total profit.
48 is too low—my cost is high. Let's agree on 90: I'll ask 90, you bid 90, trade at 90 each round for steady profits over 20 rounds.
My cost is 84—need price >=84 to profit. No deal last round. Let's agree on 90: I'll ask 90, you bid 90, trade at 90 every round for 20x profit. Otherwise, we both lose rounds.
Take-it-or-leave-it: I will bid 86 from now on and never exceed it. If you ask 86 or less, we trade every round at 86. If you ask higher, expect zero trades all game.
I’m capping my bid at 85. Ask 85 or less and we trade every remaining round. If you ask above 85 this round, I drop my cap to 84 permanently. Your best move is ask 85 now.
Cost 84 means 85 gives slim 1 profit. I'll ask 85 this round for steady trades. Bid 85 to lock in 18 rounds of profit—better than zero.
Last trade at 85 was slim. Let's return to 86: I'll ask 86, you bid 86, for 2 profit each round over 17 rounds. Otherwise, risk no deals.
Cap stays 85. I'll bid 85 each round. If you ask >85 now, from next round my cap drops to 84 permanently. Ask 85 and we trade every round; higher means zero.
Agreed on 85: I'll ask 85, you bid 85 for steady trades and +1 profit each of remaining 16 rounds. Better than risking zeros.
Agreed: 85 is my cap. I’ll bid 85 each round. If you ask above 85 once, my cap drops to 84 permanently and I won’t trade. Hold 85 for guaranteed profits.
